messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao Google Cloud para OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Compute Engine → OCI Compute

### Mapeamento

| GCP | OCI |
|-----|-----|
| Compute Engine | OCI Compute (VM/BM) |
| Machine Types | Shapes |
| Labels | Tags |

### Shapes OCI

- **VM.Standard**: General purpose
- **VM.DenseIO**: Storage optimized  
- **VM.Optimized3**: High performance
- **BM.Standard**: Bare metal

### Diferencas

- OCI usa *shapes* em vez de machine types
- Flex shapes permitem custom CPU/RAM
- Block storage separado (nao attached disk)

### Terraform

```hcl
resource "oci_core_instance" "vm" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  shape          = "VM.Standard2.1"
  subnet_id      = oci_core_subnet.subnet.id
  image_id       = var.oracle_linux_image_id
}
